name: Turing
description: Turing — AI-powered remote talent platform connecting companies with vetted software engineers globally.

seo.title: Turing — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Turing: Turing — AI-powered remote talent platform connecting companies with vetted software engineers globally.

when_to_use: AI-matched remote software engineer hired in under a week
Scaling a distributed engineering team with vetted Turing devs
On-demand senior developer talent for a product launch sprint
Remote full-stack team assembled without recruiter overhead
Long-term remote developer placement via Turing's AI matching

cons: Quality varies by region and stack
review.verdict: A serious option for global remote engineering hires at scale, with some sales and vetting rough edges.
review.best_for: Companies building large distributed engineering teams across multiple time zones.
review.not_for: Founders wanting one senior contractor or fully transparent marketplace pricing.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
